En kalender som fungerar som du arbetar: A calendar that works the way you do
Switch smoothly between month, week and day. Drag and drop to book or move.
Klicka på länken i din e-post för att gå: Click the link in your email to join instantly.
Registrera dig själv först. Sedan kan du: Register yourself first. Then invite colleagues via email. Each person gets a link, clicks it, and is instantly in the right congregation with the right permissions.
Dela Rikets sal mellan flera församlinga: Share the Kingdom Hall between multiple congregations
Allt du behöver för att koordinera salen: Everything you need to coordinate the hall
